name: troubleshooter
description: Team-specific fault-tree troubleshooting across projects and product lines.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose field issues with structured fault trees.
interface.longDescription: Troubleshooter routes issue packets, Feishu problem documents, logs, videos, CAN traces, and field notes through leader and specialist workflows. HC Robotics product-line context is separated from project corpora so multiple projects can share reusable diagnosis patterns without mixing site-specific facts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Troubleshooter to diagnose this issue packet. Identify the corpus/project/product line when possible, then separate observed facts, claims, inference, confirmed causes, excluded branches, and missing assets.
